name: @3d-hub/asset-splat-transform
description: Convert uploaded splat/ply assets to SOG HTML viewer app

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node24 --banner:js="import { createRequire as topLevelCreateRequire } from 'module'; const require = topLevelCreateRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=dist/index.mjs && cp node_modules/@playcanvas/splat-transform/lib/webp.wasm dist/webp.wasm 2>/dev/null || cp ../../node_modules/@playcanvas/splat-transform/lib/webp.wasm dist/webp.wasm && cd dist && zip -r ../lambda.zip index.mjs webp.wasm
